case_title: LEONETTI, VINCENT vs. BROWN, ANTOINETTE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST ORIGINAL LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEONETTI, VINCENT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEONETTI, VINCENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, ANTOINETTE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 331 CAMPBELL ST #5, LEASE FORFEITED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE FOR $2.90 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEONETTI, VINCENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, ANTOINETTE

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $110.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEONETTI, VINCENT AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, ANTOINETTE
DECLARATION OF JANET KLEINBERG FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEONETTI, VINCENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, ANTOINETTE
